title: Define Cabinet frontier contract
goal: Define a schema-bound Cabinet Frontier that turns maintenance findings and live signals into Bureau-importable candidates without creating Bureau tasks or dispatching work.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation
metadata.outcome: Cabinet PR #85 added Cabinet Frontier v1 contract, schema, validator, producer, tests and CI binding. The producer translates Cabinet maintenance candidates and live signals into proposal-only Frontier candidates without Bureau task creation, queue mutation, dispatch, merge/push, runtime mutation, cleanup or dump generation.

verified_acceptance.frontier-contract: docs/contracts/cabinet-frontier-v1.md documents fields, evidence, risk, acceptance, forbidden effects and proposal-only semantics.
verified_acceptance.frontier-schema: docs/contracts/cabinet-frontier-v1.schema.json and scripts/validate_cabinet_frontier.py validate Frontier candidate records.
verified_acceptance.producer-non-effects: scripts/write_cabinet_frontier.py keeps all effect flags false and check mode writes no output.
verified_acceptance.ci-bound: Cabinet Validate workflow now runs Frontier check and tests; PR #85 checks were green before merge.

checks: Cabinet PR #85 Validate Ecosystem Map SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #85 Project Cards validate SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #85 Repository Snapshot Review SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #85 Installer Shadow Test SUCCESS
local: python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts/tests OK

acceptance.assertion: A Cabinet Frontier contract documents candidate fields, evidence, risk, acceptance, forbidden effects and proposal-only semantics.
A JSON schema or equivalent validator exists for Cabinet Frontier records.
The producer keeps Bureau task creation, queue mutation, dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, cleanup and dump generation disabled.
Contract and producer are covered by deterministic tests or a recorded blocked reason.
